name: Umbral Armor
description:
This dark +1 resilient shadow studded leather armor is frequently used to bypass enemy positions or quickly travel around battlefield obstacles as it allows you to partially transit through the Netherworld.

Activate—Shroud Stride 1 (concentrate, shadow)

Frequency once per day

Effect You slip into the Netherworld for a moment, allowing you to Stride twice your speed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions and ignores difficult and hazardous terrain. Shadows lingers on the armor, causing you to become for 1 round afterward.
